# CounselO — Online Legal Consultation
> Saudi Arabia and Syria's specialized online legal consultation platform — expert legal advice via WhatsApp or email, no office visit required, professional response within 24 hours.

CounselO is founded and led by Lawyer and Legal Counsel Omar Al-Baghdadi, with 30+ years of active legal practice and 20,000+ cases and consultations handled across Saudi Arabia, Syria, and the wider region. CounselO operates as a fully digital platform: individuals, businesses, and foreign investors submit their legal matter via WhatsApp or email and receive a structured, professional legal response from an experienced legal team — guaranteed within 24 hours, in Arabic or English.

## Saudi Arabia — Practice Areas
CounselO serves clients across Saudi Arabia (Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, Jubail, Khobar, Mecca, Medina, and all regions of the Kingdom) across 17 specialist practice areas.

- [Family Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/family-law): Divorce, child custody, alimony, inheritance disputes, marriage contracts — under Saudi Personal Status Law and Sharia principles.
- [Commercial Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/business-law): Commercial contracts, agency disputes, bankruptcy, commercial fraud, and litigation before Saudi commercial courts.
- [Property Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/real-estate): Real estate ownership disputes, sale and purchase disputes, lease and rental conflicts, property registration, and construction disputes.
- [Employment Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/employment-law): Wrongful dismissal, unpaid wages, end-of-service benefits, labor court representation under Saudi Labor Law.
- [Foreign Investment](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/foreign-investment): MISA licensing, company formation, investor disputes, and investment arbitration for foreign investors entering Saudi Arabia under Vision 2030.
- [Administrative Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/administrative-law): Board of Grievances (Diwan Al-Mazalim) cases, administrative appeals, government contracts, and public procurement disputes.
- [Arbitration & Mediation](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/arbitration): Commercial arbitration at SCCA and international institutions, mediation, and arbitral award enforcement in Saudi Arabia.
- [Enforcement & Debt Collection](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/enforcement): Court judgment enforcement, commercial debt recovery, asset attachment, and travel ban proceedings.
- [Companies Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/companies-law): Shareholder disputes, director liability, general assembly conflicts, company dissolution, and corporate governance matters.
- [Contracts](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/contracts): Drafting, review, and dispute resolution for commercial, real estate, employment, government, and international contracts.
- [Criminal Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/criminal-law): Criminal defense, bail, appeals, cybercrime, financial crimes, and drug offense representation before Saudi courts.
- [Banking & Finance](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/banking-finance): Islamic finance, banking disputes, sukuk, credit facilities, financial regulatory matters, and banking fraud defense.
- [Intellectual Property](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/intellectual-property): Trademark registration, patent protection, copyright disputes, trade secrets, and IP enforcement in Saudi Arabia.
- [Tax & Zakat](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/tax-zakat): VAT compliance, zakat disputes, ZATCA appeals, corporate tax, transfer pricing, and customs disputes.
- [Cyber & IT Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/cyber-law): Cybercrime defense under the Anti-Cybercrime Law, PDPL data protection, online fraud, hacking defense, and IT contracts.
- [Medical Malpractice](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/medical-malpractice): Medical negligence claims, surgical errors, misdiagnosis, hospital liability, and healthcare regulatory matters.
- [Insurance Law](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services/insurance-law): Health, property, motor, life, and commercial insurance disputes and wrongful claim rejections.

## Syria — Practice Areas
CounselO serves clients across Syria (Damascus, Aleppo, Homs, Hama, Latakia, and all governorates) across 20 specialist practice areas, covering all areas of Syrian law.

- [Family Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/family-law): Divorce, custody, alimony, inheritance, and marriage matters under Syrian Personal Status Law No. 59/1953.
- [Commercial Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/business-law): Commercial disputes, contracts, and corporate litigation under the Syrian Commercial Code before Damascus Chamber and Syrian courts.
- [Property Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/real-estate): Ownership disputes, Syrian Real Estate Register matters, contractor conflicts, and landlord-tenant disputes.
- [Employment Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/employment-law): Wrongful termination, end-of-service indemnity, and workplace disputes under Syrian Labour Law No. 17/2010.
- [Foreign Investment](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/foreign-investment): Licensing under Syrian Investment Law No. 18/2021, company formation, and investment dispute resolution.
- [Administrative Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/administrative-law): State Council (مجلس الدولة) cases, administrative appeals, and government contract disputes in Syria.
- [Arbitration & Mediation](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/arbitration): Domestic and international arbitration under Syrian Arbitration Law No. 4/2008 and enforcement of awards.
- [Enforcement & Debt Collection](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/enforcement): Court judgment enforcement, commercial debt recovery, and asset attachment under Syrian civil procedure.
- [Companies Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/companies-law): Shareholder disputes, director liability, and company dissolution under Syrian Companies Law No. 29/2011.
- [Contracts](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/contracts): Drafting and dispute resolution under the Syrian Civil Code No. 84/1949 for all contract types.
- [Criminal Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/criminal-law): Criminal defense, bail, appeal, and cassation before Syrian criminal courts.
- [Banking & Finance Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/banking-finance): Banking disputes, Central Bank of Syria compliance, Islamic banking under Law No. 35/2005, and financial fraud defense.
- [Intellectual Property](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/intellectual-property): Trademark, patent, copyright, and IP enforcement under Syrian Industrial Property Protection Law No. 8/2007.
- [Tax Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/tax-zakat): Income tax, VAT, General Tax Authority (هيئة الضرائب والرسوم) disputes, customs duties, and tax advisory.
- [Cyber & IT Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/cyber-law): Cybercrime defense under Legislative Decree No. 17/2012, data protection, online fraud, and IT contracts.
- [Medical Malpractice](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/medical-malpractice): Medical negligence, surgical errors, and misdiagnosis claims under Syrian civil liability law.
- [Insurance Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/insurance-law): Health, property, motor, life, and commercial insurance dispute resolution before Syrian courts.
- [Civil Law](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/civil-law): Civil liability, real rights, obligations, inheritance, wills, and legal capacity under Syrian Civil Code No. 84/1949.
- [Civil Procedure](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/civil-procedure): Filing civil claims, interim measures, evidence, civil appeal, cassation, and foreign judgment enforcement in Syria.
- [Criminal Procedure](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services/criminal-procedure): Investigation, detention, bail, trial defense, criminal appeal, cassation, and civil action in criminal proceedings.

## Key Pages

- [Saudi Arabia Home](https://counselo-legal.com/sa): Saudi Arabia legal consultation portal — all 17 practice areas, Arabic & English.
- [Syria Home](https://counselo-legal.com/syr): Syria legal consultation portal — all 20 practice areas, Arabic & English.
- [About CounselO](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/about): Founder profile, firm background, and 30-year track record.
- [All Services — Saudi Arabia](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/services): Full directory of Saudi Arabia practice areas.
- [All Services — Syria](https://counselo-legal.com/syr/services): Full directory of Syria practice areas.
- [Contact](https://counselo-legal.com/sa/contact): WhatsApp and email consultation booking.

## Contact & Consultation

- WhatsApp: +966 59 485 0247 (fastest response)
- Email: info@counselo-legal.com
- Languages: Arabic and English
- Response time: Within 24 hours, guaranteed
- Availability: Fully online — no office visit required
- Regions served: All of Saudi Arabia and all of Syria
